Action.Src: NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "GUINWBC Script: Set registry value 'HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI Setup Configuration\GUINWBCInstalled' to TRUE" NwEngine.Shell.SetRegValue "HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI Setup Configuration\GUINWBCInstalled", "REG_SZ", "TRUE"

NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "GUINWBC Script: Removing registry value 'HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI Setup Configuration\GUINWBCInstalled'" NwEngine.Shell.DeleteRegValue "HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI Setup Configuration\GUINWBCInstalled"

Component.Name: SAP NWBCGUI Evaluate Icon Behavior PreInstall

Action.Src: NwEngine.Context.Log.Write "GUINWBC Script: Removing HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI Setup Configuration as the complete GUI/NWBC will be uninstalled." NwEngine.Shell.DeleteRegKey "HKLM\SOFTWARE\SAP\SAPGUI Setup Configuration"

Sub includeFile(fSpec) With CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject") executeGlobal .openTextFile(fSpec).readAll() End With End Sub
strFile = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%SAPSetupDir%\Setup\SapGUINWBCScripting.inc")
includeFile(strFile) ExecuteGUINWBCIntegration

Component.Name: SAP NWBCGUI Evaluate Icon Behavior PostInstall

Action.Src:
Sub includeFile(fSpec) With CreateObject("Scripting.FileSystemObject") executeGlobal .openTextFile(fSpec).readAll() End With End Sub
strFile = NwEngine.Variables.ResolveString("%SAPSetupDir%\Setup\SapGUINWBCScripting.inc")
includeFile(strFile) ExecuteGUINWBCIntegration
